DATED-tree PGLS (real branch lengths, Pagel's lambda ML).
matched species on dated tree: 182

predictor        beta*       SE        t        p  Pagel-l
lambda(A0)       0.226    0.124     1.83   0.0687    0.000
k_M              0.304    0.123     2.48   0.0142    0.000
g               -0.084    0.130    -0.65   0.5184    0.031

predictor        beta*       SE        t        p  Pagel-l

Compare Pagel's lambda here (dated) with the ~0 from the OTL+Grafen pass:
a non-trivial lambda means the dated tree actually carries phylogenetic signal.
